blockNumber.description: Optional specific block number for point-in-time ownership checks

chainId.description: Chain ID where the NFT contract is deployed (testnet or mainnet; must be supported/configured server-side)

ownerAddress.description: NFT owner address (optional). If omitted, defaults to the signed request walletAddress. Deployments may allow delegated subject checks, but the server will not accept subject overrides that break signature binding.
